steps.title: Use the focus shift
steps.content: The sentence says regulatory oversight can blank investors' worries and thereby let them focus on business opportunities. For that shift to make sense, the blank must mean reduce or calm the worries.

steps.title: Select the calming verb
steps.content: A means designate, B means intensify, and D means communicate. None explains why investors would stop worrying and focus elsewhere. The needed word means soothe or ease concerns. The answer is C.
